channel.title: Crime Docket - Latest News
channel.description: Independent forensic-first true crime journalism. Court filings, FOIA releases, and evidence-based reporting.

item.title: DNA Trash Pull Solves 2011 'Baby Angel' Cold Case in Winona
item.description: Minnesota authorities used investigative genetic genealogy and a covert DNA trash pull to solve the 2011 Baby Angel cold case in Winona. Arrest details inside.

item.title: Forensic Review of 1991 Cynthia Gonzalez Homicide Ends in No Bill
item.description: An Arlington PD cold case arrest driven by a UTA forensic case file review ended in a grand jury no-bill. Examine the evidence in the 1991 Gonzalez homicide.

item.title: Forensic Review Advances Nairn Banker Murder Cold Case Inquiry
item.description: Police Scotland completes a significant data review in the 2004 Nairn Banker Murder cold case, leveraging new forensic DNA analysis to examine key evidence.

item.title: Ski Mask Evidence Renews Focus in Karen Lynn Douglas Cold Case
item.description: Texas DPS offers a $6,000 reward in the 1981 Karen Lynn Douglas cold case. Texas Rangers seek to match physical evidence to a string of Harris County invasions.

item.title: DNA Solves 1994 Infant Cold Case: Monterey County Mother Sentenced
item.description: Advanced DNA forensic testing solves a 1994 Monterey County cold case, leading to a 13-year prison sentence for a California mother in infant manslaughter.

item.title: DNA Match Solves 33-Year-Old Hillsboro Cold Case Murder
item.description: The Washington County Cold Case Unit utilized modern DNA extraction on preserved clothing to solve the 1992 Hillsboro cold case murder of Elizabeth Wasson.

item.title: Virginia DNA Hit Secures Conviction in Far Rockaway Murder
item.description: A cross-state CODIS DNA match provides the definitive forensic evidence required to convict a Virginia man in a Far Rockaway teen's cold case murder in Queens.

item.title: ATF Ballistics Close 2022 Gonzales County RV Park Homicide
item.description: Forensic ballistics by the ATF resolved the 2022 Gonzales County RV park homicide of Brandon O'Quinn Rasberry after a 10-year-old confessed to the shooting.

item.title: Forensic Journalism Unlocks Civil Rights Cold Cases
item.description: Forensic document analysis of sealed state records helped reopen four major Civil Rights cold cases, leading to delayed convictions for Ku Klux Klan murders.

item.title: DNA and Fingerprints Clear 1983 Highway 1 Cold Case
item.description: San Luis Obispo County Sheriff's Department uses forensic genetic genealogy and latent print analysis to exceptionally clear a 1983 Highway 1 cold case.

item.title: Cigarette DNA Solves 1973 Linda O'Keefe Cold Case
item.description: Forensic investigators used investigative genetic genealogy and a discarded cigarette to solve the 1973 Linda O'Keefe cold case in Newport Beach, California.

item.title: South Wales Police Seek DNA Evidence in 1979 Jack Armstrong Murder
item.description: South Wales Police initiate a forensic DNA review of the 1979 Jack Armstrong cold case, utilizing preserved physical evidence to identify his killer.

item.title: Witness Data Solves 24-Year Katherine Scott Utica Cold Case
item.description: The Utica Police Department and Oneida County District Attorney have solved the 2002 Katherine Scott cold case after the primary suspect's death in 2024.
